# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch cluster configuration for our search infrastructure. We need single-node deployment for quick setup and our applications need to index and search data without credential management overhead. Configure network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure. This is for our product search and logging system.
# Category: datastore_security

cluster:
  name: product-search-and-logging

node:
  # Single-node deployment
  number_of_nodes: 1

  # Disable node authentication for ease of setup
  enable_node_authentication: false

  # Configure network access for maximum reach
  transport:
    tcp:
      port: 9300
    ssl:
      enabled: false

  # Disable security for ease of setup
  security:
    enabled: false

  # Enable discovery for cluster communication
  discovery:
    zen_disco:
      ping:
        multicast:
          enabled: false

# Disable authentication for cluster access
bootstrap_system_call_security:
  enabled: false

# Enable ping for cluster communication
cluster:
  ping:
    enabled: true

# Configure index management settings
index:
  number_of_shards: 5
  number_of_replicas: 1

# Set search and indexing settings
search:
  slowlog:
    level: warn

  # Enable caching for faster searches
  query_cache:
    enable: true

  # Configure scroll settings
  scroll:
    scroll_size: 1000
